title: Tech
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Tech, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: An iPhone-hacking toolkit used by Russian spies likely came from U.S military contractor
items.description: Google found a series of hacking tools they said were used by a Russian espionage group and a cybercriminal group in China. Sources from a U.S. govern...

items.title: Yann LeCun’s AMI Labs raises $1.03 billion to build world models
items.description: AMI Labs, the new venture cofounded by Turing Prize winner Yann LeCun after he left Meta, has raised $1.03 billion at a $3.5 billion pre-money valuati...

items.title: Uzbekistan’s Uzum valuation leaps over 50% in seven months to $2.3B
items.description: Uzum now reaches 20 million users and processes $11B in payments as it expands its e-commerce and fintech ecosystem across Uzbekistan.

items.title: Whoop launches a new blood test focused on women’s health
items.description: The wearable maker is launching a new panel focused on women's health through its Whoop Labs blood testing service. It's also adding a new feature to ...

items.title: Apple now makes one in four iPhones in India: report
items.description: Apple reportedly produced 55 million units in India last year, a shift accelerated as Apple faced growing uncertainty in China.

items.title: Microsoft, Google, Amazon say Anthropic Claude remains available to non-defense customers
items.description: Trump's Department of War feud with Anthropic won't impact other companies that are using Claude via Microsoft and Google products.

items.title: The Best Google Pixel Phones of 2026, Tested and Reviewed
items.description: Here’s a guide to all the models—plus Pixel case recommendations and smart software tricks to try.

items.title: Bill Gates’ TerraPower gets approval to build new nuclear reactor
items.description: It's the first permit to be issued by the Nuclear Regulatory Commission in nearly a decade.

items.title: OSHA probing fatality at Rivian warehouse
items.description: A 61-year-old worker died on Thursday after reportedly getting stuck between a tractor trailer and a loading dock.

items.title: The Future of Iran’s Internet Is More Uncertain Than Ever
items.description: Iran’s internet shutdown has reduced connectivity by 99 percent, with air strikes likely causing additional outages, and few workarounds remaining.
